QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_74

question.text: What is the eligible age range for joining the Atal Pension Yojana (APY)?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** APY is open to citizens aged 18 to 40 years in the unorganized sector. The 22-year contribution period ensures sufficient corpus for guaranteed pension. **The Trap:** The upper age limit is 40, not 50 or 60. This ensures at least 20 years of contribution before pension starts at age 60. **Cross-Exam Context:** APY age 18-40 ensures minimum 20-year contribution. NPS All Citizens is 18-70 with different rules for late joiners. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Target unorganized sector workers aged 18-40 for APY enrollment. The earlier they join, the lower the monthly contribution.
